scoringPlays.text: J. Laubstein run for 40 yds, for a TD (L. Drzewiecki KICK)
Lucky Sutton 1 Yd Run (Gabriel Plascencia Kick)
Donovan Brown 46 Yd pass from Jayden Denegal (Gabriel Plascencia Kick)
D.J. McKinney 54 Yd Run (Luke Drzewiecki Kick)
Cade Keith 25 Yd pass from Jack Layne (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)

videos.headline: James Laubstein takes it himself for 40-yard TD
videos.description: James Laubstein fights off a tackle and breaks free for a 40-yard New Mexico touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (James Laubstein takes it himself for 40-yard TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Denegal throws 46-yard TD pass
videos.description: Jayden Denegal drops it off right into the hands of Donovan Brown for a 46-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Denegal throws 46-yard TD pass) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: D.J. McKinney scores 54-yard New Mexico TD
videos.description: D.J. McKinney finds a gap in the defense and takes off for a 54-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (D.J. McKinney scores 54-yard New Mexico TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET
